title: 发布 AI Cockpit v0.5.25
outOfScope: tags and GitHub Release publication before the release Work Item is verified

sources.reason: Canonical public release metadata and supply-chain evidence digests.
Default installer reference that must point to the new immutable release tag.
Release workflow requires an exact verified main SHA and matching release.json tag.
Public release distribution contract and historical-tag boundary.
Repository Work Item and verification requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: A new immutable release must keep canonical metadata, installer defaults, and exact-SHA release evidence aligned without rewriting historical evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Release target, scope, evidence sources, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that v0.5.25 is the only new release reference, v0.5.24 historical fixtures remain unchanged, and release evidence remains exact-SHA based.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json has releaseTag exactly equal to v0.5.25 and preserves the existing publicContract, capabilities, and supplyChain evidence fields.
install.sh defaults and help text plus the release distribution documentation reference v0.5.25 consistently, while historical fixtures remain unchanged.
The exact source commit is origin/main at 39698ea3b455b24bdda4616901f6cd2bfdb0e6f4, and the repository passes the declared local quality and release-distribution checks before publication.
The release workflow can publish only a new immutable v0.5.25 tag after successful exact-SHA smoke and compatibility Actions runs.
guidelines: Treat release.json as the canonical release version and keep the installer default synchronized with it.
Do not rewrite historical release tags, fixtures, or evidence records.
Treat GitHub Actions as the authoritative compatibility validation for the exact main commit.

intent.problem: The merged trust-positioning documentation is on main, but the canonical release metadata and installer default still identify v0.5.24.
constraints: Release v0.5.25 from the merged main commit only after local governance and quality checks pass.
Keep the Work Item documentation-only changes and historical v0.5.24 evidence intact.
Do not publish the tag until the branch is merged and post-merge Actions are successful.
intent.rationale: A separate release Work Item makes the new version a complete, auditable metadata and exact-SHA publication unit.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: canonical release metadata and installer default identify v0.5.25
historical v0.5.24 evidence and fixtures remain unchanged
local release checks pass for the exact merged main source commit
post-merge Actions provide successful exact-SHA smoke and compatibility evidence before publication

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly confirmed the new-version release workflow; generated SBOM, provenance, and release-digest evidence are required for that release.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
